description: TEMPLATE. Copy this file to data/group_knowledge.json and replace with your group's real facts. Optional date fields (event_date_hint, source_date_start, source_date_end, last_updated) are auto-populated by generate_knowledge_base.py and surfaced by the retriever only when the user asks about timing.
